daft:position-deletes:v2.notes: Daft supports reading Iceberg tables with position deletes via PyIceberg

daft:position-deletes:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Daft does not yet support equality deletes; only positional deletes are supported
caveats: Equality deletes on the roadmap (see GitHub #2458)

daft:equality-deletes:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Daft supports merge-on-read with position deletes only; equality deletes not yet supported
caveats: Only position delete files supported for MOR; equality deletes on roadmap

daft:merge-on-read:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:copy-on-write:v2.notes: Daft supports reading copy-on-write Iceberg tables (data files contain final state)

daft:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Daft supports reading schema-evolved Iceberg tables via PyIceberg

daft:schema-evolution:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are an Iceberg V3 feature; not applicable to V2

daft:column-default-values:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; column default values is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are an Iceberg V3 feature; not applicable to V2

daft:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; nanosecond timestamps is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: Daft leverages hidden partitioning for efficient reads with partition pruning

daft:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:partition-evolution:v2.notes: Daft supports reading partition-evolved Iceberg tables via PyIceberg

daft:partition-evolution:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument partition transforms are an Iceberg V3 feature; not applicable to V2

daft:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; multi arg transforms is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:time-travel:v2.notes: Daft supports time travel by snapshot ID; timestamp-based and snapshot slice queries are on the roadmap
caveats: Only snapshot ID-based time travel; timestamp-based lookups and snapshot slices on roadmap

daft:time-travel:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:table-maintenance:v2.notes: Daft does not provide table maintenance operations (compaction, expiring snapshots, etc.)
caveats: Use PyIceberg or Spark for table maintenance

daft:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Daft does not support Iceberg branching and tagging

daft:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:read-support:v2.notes: Full distributed read support for Iceberg V2 tables via PyIceberg; includes predicate pushdown and partition pruning

daft:read-support:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:write-insert:v2.notes: Daft supports append and overwrite write modes to Iceberg tables via PyIceberg

daft:write-insert:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: Daft does not support SQL MERGE, UPDATE, or DELETE operations; only append and overwrite modes are available via write_iceberg()
caveats: No row-level MERGE/UPDATE/DELETE; use append or overwrite mode only

daft:write-merge-update-delete:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:catalog-integration:v2.notes: Daft supports all Iceberg catalogs available through PyIceberg (REST, Hive, Glue, SQL, DynamoDB)

daft:catalog-integration:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:hive-metastore:v2.notes: Hive Metastore catalog supported via PyIceberg

daft:hive-metastore:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: AWS Glue Catalog supported via PyIceberg

daft:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:rest-catalog:v2.notes: REST Catalog fully supported via PyIceberg; confirmed in Daft FAQ

daft:rest-catalog:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:nessie:v2.notes: Nessie catalog accessible via PyIceberg REST Catalog interface
caveats: Accessed through REST catalog protocol; not a native PyIceberg catalog type

daft:nessie:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:polaris:v2.notes: Polaris catalog accessible via PyIceberg REST Catalog interface
caveats: Accessed through REST catalog protocol

daft:polaris:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:unity-catalog:v2.notes: Unity Catalog accessible via PyIceberg REST Catalog interface
caveats: Accessed through REST catalog protocol; requires compatible Unity Catalog version

daft:unity-catalog:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: Hadoop catalog is not supported by PyIceberg and therefore not available in Daft

daft:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: Hadoop catalog is not supported by PyIceberg

daft:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: JDBC catalog is a Java concept; PyIceberg has a SQL catalog but not JDBC. Daft does not support JDBC catalogs
caveats: PyIceberg offers a SQL catalog as an alternative

daft:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: JDBC catalog is not supported; PyIceberg has SQL catalog as alternative

daft:table-creation:v2.notes: Daft supports creating Iceberg tables via Session.create_table() and PyIceberg integration

daft:table-creation:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant Type is a V3 feature

daft:variant-type:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; variant type is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded Variant is a V3 feature

daft:shredded-variant:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; shredded variant is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry Type is a V3 feature

daft:geometry-type:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; geometry type is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:lineage:v2.notes: Row lineage is an Iceberg V3 feature; not applicable to V2

daft:lineage:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; lineage is a V3 feature
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:statistics:v2.notes: Daft reads column statistics from Iceberg manifest files via PyIceberg for predicate pushdown and file pruning during scan planning. Writes column statistics when appending data.

daft:statistics:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:bloom-filters:v2.notes: Daft does not support reading or writing Iceberg bloom filters (Parquet-level or Puffin-based).

daft:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced; track progress at github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft/issues/2458

daft:type-promotion:v2.notes: Daft is a DataFrame engine focused on reads and writes via PyIceberg. It does not provide DDL operations for type promotion; type changes must be performed using PyIceberg's update_schema() API or another engine.
caveats: Daft can read Iceberg tables that have been type-promoted by other engines
No ALTER TABLE or schema DDL support in Daft

daft:type-promotion:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support
caveats: Daft V3 support not yet announced

daft:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: Daft supports REST catalog natively via PyIceberg integration. Configure with type=rest and the Horizon Catalog endpoint.

daft:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v3.notes: Daft V3 REST catalog support not yet documented.
caveats: V3 support via Daft not yet documented

daft:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

daft:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Daft has not announced Iceberg V3 support; deletion vector support is undocumented.
caveats: No Iceberg V3 support announced
